title: Sending emails via Outlook Exchange
excerpt: Microsoft has limits of less than 30 messages per minute. How do I make sure that mass mailing and sequences functions from the CRM does not cause issues with MS exchange servers.

posts.author: markg (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml: Microsoft has limits of less than 30 messages per minute. How do I make sure that mass mailing and sequences functions from the CRM does not cause issues with MS exchange servers.
